document_info.prepared_by: Margaret Sullivan, Vice President of Risk Management (Applicant); Producer: David Reinhardt / M. Johnson

business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Workers' Compensation / Commercial Lines (per policy number prefix WC)
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC GLFS 2025 8820; Effective Date 06/01/2025. Prior carriers: Hartford Financial Services (2023, premium $2,076,475.35), Auto-Owners Insurance (2022, premium $2,014,585.01). Reviewer annotation 'Need docs' present on prior insurance history section.

positives: Formal written safety program in place
38 years in business; 25 years under current management indicating operational stability
GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
CSA BASIC Vehicle Maintenance score below 10% of intervention threshold
No DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years
No policy cancellations across all three prior policy years
Hired auto and non-owned auto exposure is covered
concerns: CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above intervention threshold (noted as currently being addressed)
No written contracts with all subcontractors — subcontractor liability exposure present
Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations increase exposure
Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight add cargo and mechanical dependency risk
Three different primary carriers in three consecutive years may indicate adverse loss experience or underwriting challenges
Claims frequency of 10–13 claims per year across prior policy periods
Inconsistent dates on signature section: typed date is 03/15/2026 but a handwritten date of 6/18/2025 also appears
Producer signature shows 'M. Johnson' while printed name lists 'David Reinhardt' — identity discrepancy warrants clarification
Reviewer annotation 'Need docs' on prior insurance history — documentation pending
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024 (Hanover Insurance Group): 10 claims, premium $2,068,013.98, no cancellations. 2023 (Hartford Financial Services): 13 claims, premium $2,076,475.35, no cancellations. 2022 (Auto-Owners Insurance): 12 claims, premium $2,014,585.01, no cancellations. Three-year total: 35 claims across three different carriers.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Primary commodities hauled: Dry van — general freight and packaged goods; Flatbed — steel, lumber, and machinery. Operating authority: Interstate (FMCSA) only. Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations. Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight also in fleet. Hours of operation: Mon–Fri 6:00 AM – 4:30 PM. 9 locations spanning Ohio and Pennsylvania totaling approximately 735,000 sq ft (7 warehouses, 1 service/repair facility, 1 office).
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire. Hired auto and non-owned auto exposure covered. CSA BASIC Vehicle Maintenance score below 10% of intervention threshold. CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score above intervention threshold — currently being addressed. No DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years. Drivers reported to be in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three-year loss history reflects 35 total claims with no policy cancellations. 2024: 10 claims, Hanover Insurance Group, premium $2,068,013.98. 2023: 13 claims, Hartford Financial Services, premium $2,076,475.35. 2022: 12 claims, Auto-Owners Insurance, premium $2,014,585.01. Reviewer has flagged prior insurance history with notation 'Need docs,' indicating supporting loss runs or documentation have not yet been received.
